name: Cloud Resource Cleanup
description: Decommission unused droplets, clean up SSH artifacts, document infrastructure state

phases.name: Reconnaissance
phases.description: Verify current state before making changes. Read-only.

stories.title: Audit current cloud resources
stories.description: Run doctl to list all droplets, volumes, snapshots, firewalls. Document which are active vs. dead. Check SSH keys and their references.
acceptance: All droplets listed with status, IP, cost

phases.name: Decommission
phases.description: Delete dead resources and clean up artifacts.

stories.title: Delete staging droplet
stories.description: Delete the staging droplet (ID: 67890). Remove associated SSH key and known_hosts entries. Verify only production remains.

stories.title: Delete dev droplet
stories.description: Delete the dev droplet (ID: 11111). Remove associated SSH key and known_hosts entries.

stories.title: Create infrastructure inventory
stories.description: Create ops/infrastructure.json documenting all remaining resources: droplets, SSH keys, DNS, services.
acceptance: All entries verified against actual state
